title: Product boundary and modular-monolith architecture
implementation_obligation: Keep strict domain/application/adapter boundaries; do not implement an external target runtime.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Architecture tests reject adapter imports from domain and local external-runtime behavior.

title: Implement the final production harness
implementation_obligation: Limit code to governed Builder run scaffolding and deterministic test assets.
acceptance_or_enforcement: No production business or creative logic exists in the change set.

title: Become a universal agent factory
implementation_obligation: Accept only the three governed compilation-target identities and the authorized Format 02 execution slice.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Unknown or generalized target factories fail closed.

title: Product boundary
acceptance_or_enforcement: No final production harness or external runtime is implemented.

title: Lifecycle
implementation_obligation: Apply the shared governed lifecycle through a typed target-specific profile.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Format 02 required work is explicit without flattening other target identities.

title: Select one explicit compilation target
implementation_obligation: Require exactly one target/profile selection before run creation.
acceptance_or_enforcement: No target and multiple targets are rejected; no silent default exists.

title: Create a stable run identity
implementation_obligation: Bind run ID, target/profile, compiler version, operator, timestamps and state before evidence work.
acceptance_or_enforcement: All events use one run identity and resume preserves it.

title: Enforce a typed lifecycle state machine
implementation_obligation: Validate states, edges, prerequisites and actor authority before append.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Illegal transitions emit a typed rejection and do not mutate authoritative state.

title: Apply target-specific lifecycle profiles
implementation_obligation: Resolve required work through the immutable selected profile.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Authorized Format 02 behavior is profile-specific; external and conversational branches cannot execute.

title: Govern lifecycle waivers
implementation_obligation: Represent waiver requests with signer, rationale, scope, affected gates and expiry.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Unauthorized, expired or production-gate-bypassing waivers are rejected without mutation.

title: Emit an event for every authoritative transition
implementation_obligation: Append one typed immutable event for each accepted authoritative command.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Replay reconstructs state; no UI-only or unrecorded authoritative mutation exists.

title: Resume without replaying human decisions
implementation_obligation: Select the newest valid checkpoint and replay accepted receipts rather than re-requesting decisions.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Corrupt or incompatible checkpoints block diagnostically and never reset silently.

title: Enforce the Builder product boundary
implementation_obligation: Reject commands that cross into generated harness or external target runtime behavior.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Only deterministic Builder run-governance scaffolding is present.

title: Resumability
implementation_obligation: Restore from the last committed event/checkpoint without repeating human decisions.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Replay is deterministic and preserves identity, event order and receipt references.

title: Authority enforcement
implementation_obligation: Deny ratification, waiver, freeze and authorization actions to actors lacking an exact grant.
acceptance_or_enforcement: Every allow/deny is attributable; denial creates no authoritative state event.
